backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a real estate backend with contact form submission (public), contact request retrieval (admin-only), and user profile management (user-only), using role-based access control via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the Footer component's background color was updated to match the LandingHeader's background color, with high confidence and a single test requirement (REQ-1).
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, styling tokens, and key changes, serving as a build-planning reference for the project's React/Tailwind frontend.
frontend/.ic-assets.json: ICP asset configuration that ensures the `.well-known` directory is not ignored and gets served by the Internet Computer asset canister.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark modes, covering background, foreground, card, sidebar, chart, and other semantic color variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags, the page title 'Your trusted, on-the-ground Real state team', Google Fonts preconnect for Inter and Playfair Display, and a root div mounting the React app.
frontend/public/.well-known/ic-domains: ICP domain verification file listing the two custom domains (myplaceatqueretaro.com and www.myplaceatqueretaro.com) associated with the canister.
frontend/public/robots.txt: SEO-friendly robots.txt that explicitly allows Googlebot, Bingbot, PerplexityBot, and all other crawlers to access all paths.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the single-page landing layout by composing LandingHeader, HeroSection, FeaturesSection, AboutSection, ContactSection, ScheduleConsultationSection, and Footer in order.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section displaying a business description, three trust indicators (36+ years, 500+ clients/year, 98% satisfaction), and a team image with a decorative background element.
frontend/src/components/ContactForm.tsx: Simple HTML form component that posts name, email, phone, and message fields directly to a Formspree endpoint, with accessible 44px touch targets and no custom state management.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact section combining the ContactForm with business contact details (phone, email, location), social media links (Facebook, Instagram, YouTube), and a business hours card, all opening external links in new tabs.
Renders a 'Why Choose Us' section with four feature cards (Premium Accommodations, Prime Locations, Trusted Service, Personalized Experience) and a YouTube link button.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand logo, quick navigation links, legal links, copyright notice, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Renders the full-screen hero section with a background image, headline, subtitle, and CTA buttons that scroll to 'contact' and 'features' sections.
frontend/src/components/LandingHeader.ts: Fixed navigation header with logo, desktop nav links, a 'Book' button, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu that scrolls to page sections.
frontend/src/components/ScheduleConsulta: Renders a consultation scheduling section that lazily loads and displays an inline Calendly widget when the 'Book' button is clicked.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and returns an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) access, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, identity persistence, and exposing login status states.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a Querétaro-inspired warm terracotta color theme, including light and dark mode variables for header, footer, primary, accent, and other UI tokens.
frontend/src/lib/scrollToSection.ts: Exports a `scrollToSection` utility that smoothly scrolls to a DOM element by ID, offsetting for the fixed header height.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped in `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that maps OKLCH CSS variables to semantic color tokens (primary, header, footer, etc.), extends typography, container queries, animations, and custom font families.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the current feature request to match the Footer component's background color to the LandingHeader component's background color for visual consistency.
